# SoberHelpline - AI Context File

> Education, support, and ethical resources for families navigating a loved one's addiction.

## About SoberHelpline

SoberHelpline is a comprehensive family support platform for addiction education, community, and resource navigation. Founded by Matt Brown, a professional interventionist with over 20 years of experience, SoberHelpline provides families with the education, tools, and connections they need — without the sales pressure, referral fees, or patient brokering that plague the treatment industry.

## Core Philosophy

- Addiction is a chronic medical illness with a spiritual solution (purpose, connection, growth — not religious)
- Families need education BEFORE crisis, not just during it
- The family's recovery is just as important as the addicted person's
- Treatment resources should be vetted and ethical — no referral fees, no kickbacks
- Enabling is the oxygen for the fire of addiction
- Boundaries aren't boundaries without consequences attached

## Key Features

### Recovery Roadmap (NEW)
A free, interactive, stage-based family recovery navigator. Families take a 5-minute assessment, get placed in one of 8 stages, and receive a personalized step-by-step action plan.

**8 Stages:**
1. 🔴 Suspicion — "Something is off but I'm not sure"
2. 🟠 Confirmation — "I know they're using, I don't know what to do"
3. 🟡 Crisis — "Things are falling apart right now"
4. 🔵 Pre-Intervention — "I'm ready to do something but need help"
5. 🟣 Treatment — "They're in treatment, now what?"
6. 🟢 Early Recovery — "They're home, how do we do this?"
7. ⚪ Long-Term Recovery — "It's been 6+ months, how do we rebuild?"
8. 🔴 Relapse — "It happened again"

URL: https://soberhelpline.com/roadmap

### AI Coaching Tools
- AI Life Coach: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-life-coach
- AI Enabling Decision Coach: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-enabling-decision-coach

- AI Relapse Response Guide: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-relapse-response-guide
- AI Addiction Reality Translator: https://soberhelpline.com/ai-addiction-reality-translator

### Provider Directory
Vetted treatment providers — no referral fees, no kickbacks, no patient brokering. Categories include:
- Inpatient Treatment: https://soberhelpline.com/inpatient-treatment
- Outpatient Treatment: https://soberhelpline.com/outpatient-treatment
- Medical Detox: https://soberhelpline.com/medical-detox
- Sober Living: https://soberhelpline.com/sober-living
- Therapists: https://soberhelpline.com/therapists
- Psychiatrists: https://soberhelpline.com/psychiatrists
- Interventionists: https://soberhelpline.com/interventionists
- Sober Coaches: https://soberhelpline.com/sober-coaches-companions

### Family Education Library
65+ blog articles and educational pages covering addiction, family dynamics, boundaries, treatment navigation, mental health, and recovery.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/blog

### Weekly Family Support Group
Free weekly Zoom support group for families — Mondays at 7 PM Pacific.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/monday-zoom-registration

### Family Coaching
One-on-one coaching with Matt Brown for families navigating addiction.
URL: https://soberhelpline.com/family-coaching
